title: Interface Congestion Buildup — branch-chennai
description: Gradual bandwidth utilization increase detected on branch-chennai. Link utilization climbed from 62% to 94% over 90 minutes. VoIP and video traffic experiencing quality degradation. Queue depth at 77% of maximum buffer capacity.
impact: VoIP call quality degraded, video conferencing affected, ERP response times elevated
root_cause: Sustained high traffic volume combined with insufficient QoS prioritization
resolution_action: Reverted QoS policy to approved template

title: BGP Route Flap — hub-delhi
description: BGP neighbor instability detected at hub-delhi. Peer 10.0.0.1 flapped 12 times. 9 prefixes withdrawn and re-announced. Hold timer reduced to 66s. Downstream path rerouting observed on dependent branches.
impact: Intermittent connectivity loss to 5 downstream sites. Route reconvergence in progress.
root_cause: ISP maintenance without prior notification / physical layer instability
resolution_action: Applied QoS rate-limiting on congested interface

title: MPLS Tunnel Degradation — branch-guwahati

impact: Reduced throughput, increased latency, risk of tunnel down event
